query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A person sits facing away from the camera with knees drawn upward toward the chest, positioned in front of a wall illuminated by purple light. Several distinct beams of light radiate upward and outward from behind the figure's shoulders. A horizontal bar or rail crosses the wall behind the seated subject. The figure appears as a dark shape set against the lighter violet background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A soft-focus, heavily grained photograph captures a solitary figure sitting with their back to the viewer, knees drawn up, rendered as a dark silhouette against a violet-lit wall. Intentional blur softens the figure's edges while prominent film grain textures the entire surface. Muted, desaturated monochrome purple tones and extreme underexposure crush the subject into near-black shadow, producing a distressed, melancholic atmosphere. Radiating light beams streak upward behind the figure, reinforcing an unsettling sense of isolation within the confined space.
